check_content_excerpt:
Work with the SIEM administrator to determine if an alert is configured when audit data is no longer received as expected.

If there is no alert configured, this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt: Work with the SIEM administrator to configure an alert when no audit data is received from Apache based on the defined schedule of connections.
title: The Apache web server must use a logging mechanism that is configured to provide a warning to the Information System Security Officer (ISSO) and System Administrator (SA) when allocated record storage volume reaches 75 percent of maximum log record storage capacity.
